Model context

This dashboard ranks each stock in the MSCI ACWI universe across six core pillars and combines them into one total score.
Scores are relative for this specific run, from 1 (weakest) to 10 (strongest) versus the current universe.
Market and Equal only change how group results are aggregated; they do not change the underlying stock scores.

Top exposure & leaders

Investment style

Top holdings by sector

Model info

Each stock is scored on six pillars and then combined into a total score.

Each pillar score runs from 1 to 10 and is relative to the current MSCI ACWI universe for this dashboard run.

For grouped views, Market uses portfolio weights and Equal gives each stock the same weight.
